achievements.title: You're Kidding, Right?
achievements.description: You got the mighty Yo-Yo!

achievements.title: Let the Search Begin
achievements.description: You defeated the C-Serpent and began your search for Uncle Steve!

achievements.title: Cobra Commander
achievements.description: You defeated the C-Serpent without taking damage!

achievements.title: Dolphin Rescue
achievements.description: You defeated the evil Octo and helped the dolphins!

achievements.description: You defeated Magma without taking damage!

achievements.description: You exorcised Maxie and retrieved the Crystal Ball!

achievements.description: You found and defeated the final Minie in the Graveyard!

achievements.description: You've been swallowed by a whale?!

achievements.description: You deciphered the code and began homing in on Uncle Steve's location!

achievements.title: It's Delicious!
achievements.description: You ate the Apple! But nothing happened...
